result.stdout:
Usage: webkit [command]

WebKit

Commands:
  new        Creates a static Web application
  build      Builds a static Web application
  rebuild    Cleans and Rebuilds the static website.
  clean      Cleans the build output
  serve      Serves a static Web application with optional hot-reload
  cache      Cache management commands

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: webkit clean [--env <EnvironmentMode>] [--help]

Cleans the build output

Options:
  --env <EnvironmentMode>     (Allowed values: Production, Development)
  -h, --help                 Show help message

  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: webkit new [--name <String>] [--template <String>] [--cdn <String>] [--help]

Creates a static Web application

Options:
  -n, --name <String>        The name of the website (Default: MyWebKitProject)
  -t, --template <String>    The template to use (zip file path or template name). (Default: default-v1)
  --cdn <String>             The base CDN URL for templates (default: https://cdn.bosonware.org) (Default: https://cdn.bosonware.org)
  -h, --help                 Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: webkit new [--name <String>] [--template <String>] [--cdn <String>] [--help]

Creates a static Web application

Options:
  -n, --name <String>        The name of the website (Default: MyWebKitProject)
  -t, --template <String>    The template to use (zip file path or template name). (Default: default-v1)
  --cdn <String>             The base CDN URL for templates (default: https://cdn.bosonware.org) (Default: https://cdn.bosonware.org)
  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: webkit serve [--host <String>] [--port <Int32>] [--no-build] [--clean] [--watch] [--help]

Serves a static Web application with optional hot-reload

Options:
  -h, --host <String>     (Default: localhost)
  -p, --port <Int32>      (Default: 3000)
  --no-build             Skip build process.
  --clean                Rebuilds the project.
  --watch                Enable hot-reload with live refresh.
  --help                 Show help message

commands.payload:

  -h, --host <String>     (Default: localhost)
  -p, --port <Int32>      (Default: 3000)
  --no-build             Skip build process.
  --clean                Rebuilds the project.
  --watch                Enable hot-reload with live refresh.
  --help                 Show help message
